data.name: xrTableCell59.ExpressionBindings
data.value:
Iif( sumSum(Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([MalePlaced]), 0, [MalePlaced])) > 0,
FormatString( '{0:0.##} %', ( sumSum(Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CumMaleMort]), 0, [CumMaleMort])) + sumSum(Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([CumMaleCulls]), 0, [CumMaleCulls])) ) / sumSum(Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([MalePlaced]), 0, [MalePlaced])) * 100 ),
'0 %' )

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
